verse_text: So the Lord said, 'I shall also remove Judah from My sight, as I removed Israel. I shall reject this city Jerusalem which I chose, and the house where I said, 'My name shall be there.' '

links.context: Chose this city: Jerusalem is specifically mentioned throughout the Old Testament as having been the city God has chosen for His name (see 3Kg 8:44, 48; 11:32, 36; 14:21; [[2KI.23:27]]; [[2CH.6:34]], [[2CH.6:38]]; 12:13; WSir 49:6).
